data.name: Confirm_Delete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this record?

data.name: Confirm_Cancel
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this operation?

data.name: Home_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Experience comfortable and affordable travel with Turkey's trusted airline

data.name: ForgotPassword_Subtitle
data.value: We'll send a verification code to your email

data.name: Error_Generic
data.value: An error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Profile_UpdateSuccess
data.value: Your profile has been updated successfully.

data.name: Password_ChangeSuccess
data.value: Your password has been changed successfully.

data.name: Flight_LoadError
data.value: Flight information could not be loaded.

data.name: Route_LoadError
data.value: Route information could not be loaded.

data.name: Airport_LoadError
data.value: Airport information could not be loaded.

data.name: Aircraft_LoadError
data.value: Aircraft information could not be loaded.

data.name: Booking_CreateSuccess
data.value: Your booking has been created successfully.

data.name: Booking_LoadError
data.value: Booking information could not be loaded.

data.name: Dashboard_LoadError
data.value: Dashboard information could not be loaded.

data.name: Account_SignUpSuccess
data.value: Sign up completed. You can now sign in.

data.name: Account_SignInError
data.value: Sign in failed. Invalid username or password.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.name: Account_SignIn_Failed
data.value: Sign in failed. Invalid username or password.

data.name: Account_ResetPassword_Successful
data.value: Your password has been reset successfully.

data.name: Account_ForgotPassword_Successful
data.value: A verification code has been sent to your email.

data.name: AppUser_HasBeen_Added
data.value: Registration completed successfully. You can now sign in.

data.name: Booking_HasBeen_Added
data.value: Your booking has been created successfully.

data.name: Booking_Was_Cancelled
data.value: Your booking has been cancelled successfully.

data.name: Val_UsernameOrEmail_Required
data.value: Username or email cannot be empty.

data.name: Val_Password_TooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: Val_Password_SignUp_TooShort
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Val_Password_Uppercase
data.value: Must contain at least one uppercase letter.

data.name: Val_Password_Lowercase
data.value: Must contain at least one lowercase letter.

data.name: Val_Password_Digit
data.value: Must contain at least one digit.

data.name: Val_Password_Special
data.value: Must contain at least one special character.

data.name: Val_Name_TooShort
data.value: First name must be at least 2 characters.

data.name: Val_Surname_TooShort
data.value: Last name must be at least 2 characters.

data.name: Val_Username_Format
data.value: Only letters, digits, '.', '_' and '-' are allowed.

data.name: Val_Email_Invalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Val_BirthDate_Required
data.value: Date of birth cannot be empty.

data.name: Val_BirthDate_MinAge
data.value: You must be over 18 years old.

data.name: Val_BirthDate_Valid
data.value: Please enter a valid date of birth.

data.name: Val_IATA_Different
data.value: Departure and arrival must be different.

data.name: Val_Passengers_Range
data.value: Number of passengers must be between 1 and 9.

data.name: Val_DepartureTime_Future
data.value: Departure time must be in the future.

data.name: Val_ArrivalTime_AfterDeparture
data.value: Arrival time must be after departure time.

data.name: Val_EconomyPrice_Positive
data.value: Economy price must be greater than zero.

data.name: Val_ManufactureYear_Range
data.value: Manufacture year must be between 1950 and 2030.

data.name: Placeholder_SearchUser
data.value: Search by name, username or email...

data.name: Placeholder_SearchAirport
data.value: Search by IATA code, city, country...

data.name: Placeholder_SearchBooking
data.value: Passenger name, flight number, booking code...

data.name: Hangfire_Info
data.value: Hangfire Dashboard lets you manage background jobs. View recurring, enqueued, and processing tasks.

data.name: Error_SameAirport
data.value: Origin and destination airports cannot be the same!

data.name: AccessDenied_Message
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page.

data.name: Account_NotifDescription
data.value: Choose the channels through which you want to receive flight reminders and reservation notifications.

data.name: ResetPassword_Subtitle
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email and your new password

data.name: Footer_Description
data.value: Turkey's trusted airline. Enjoy flying with comfort, safety and affordable prices.

data.name: Home_HeroDescription
data.value: The best flight experience at the most affordable prices. Reach your dream destination with SkyWay.

data.name: Feature_SafeFlight_Desc
data.value: We serve you with the highest safety standards.

data.name: Feature_AffordablePrice_Desc
data.value: The best flight experience at competitive prices.

data.name: Feature_Support_Desc
data.value: Always by your side, solution-oriented for every problem.

data.name: Feature_Online_Desc
data.value: Buy tickets, check-in, do everything online.

data.name: Alert_InvalidIata
data.value: Please enter a valid IATA code (e.g. IST, LHR)

data.name: About_MissionTitle
data.value: Making the Joy of Flying Accessible to Everyone

data.name: About_MissionText1
data.value: At SkyWay Airlines, we aim to provide our passengers with a safe, comfortable and affordable flight experience.

data.name: About_MissionText2
data.value: With our years of high safety standards and customer satisfaction-focused service approach, we are among the most trusted airlines in the industry.

data.name: About_SafetyFirst_Desc
data.value: Full compliance with international safety standards. Comprehensive technical inspection before every flight.

data.name: About_EcoFriendly_Desc
data.value: We're working to reduce our carbon footprint.

data.name: About_AwardedService_Desc
data.value: Recognized and awarded quality in the industry.

data.name: Flight_SearchSubtitle
data.value: Search flights by route, date and class

data.name: Flight_TryDifferent
data.value: Try a different date or route.
